texto: Never give up hope, no matter how dark things may seem.
explicacao: Citação de A. T. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Never give up hope, no matter how dark things may seem.” articula motivacao, heroism, esperanca em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: Never give up hope, no matter how dark things may seem.

texto: Look at the fire. See the colors there? Blending together. Beautifully dangerous. Red blending into orange, orange blending into yellow. Beautiful and dangerous. Feel the heat, feel the attraction to it. Let the beauty overcome you. Let the fire in, but never let it take over. Love the fire. Love its heat. Let yourself revel in how the fire's warmth feels on your skin. Feel the fire, love the fire, but don't ever become the fire. Never let anyone extinguish your inner fire. Feed your fire and let it burn bright, let its heat warm your soul.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de A.T. que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Look at the fire. See the colors there? Blending together. Beautifully dangerous. Red blending in…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, fire, blending, com foco em termino e reflexao.
